name: Fowler Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Likely Calvert County Public Schools (Prince Frederick MD area)
recent_news: No M&A or news found; minimal web footprint. Calvert County uses a network of small private contractors for yellow-bus service.
fit_notes: Possible micro tuck-in in MD (Calvert County) if active and independently owned. Very small scale (~31 employees, ~$1.25M rev est), no public website/phone - likely an aging family op. Worth a direct call to confirm operating status and succession interest.

name: Jefferson's Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Calvert County Public Schools (Lusby/Solomons area, Southern MD)
recent_news: No M&A activity. FMCSA MCS-150 refreshed Jan 2025; carrier active with ~10 power units / 10 drivers; 198k miles in 2024. Long-tenured family op (DOT #543811 since 1993).
fit_notes: Classic small family-owned MD school bus op (Jefferson family, women-owned per Buzzfile, ~30+ yr history). Sub-scale (~10 buses) so individually de minimis, but Summit could roll up several Calvert County micro-contractors (Fowler, Jefferson's, etc.) into a regional cluster. Succession likely high given operator age.

name: Oregon Inter-City Bus Co
recent_news: No web/news footprint under this exact name. Listed address (20569 Pine Vista Dr, Bend) is residential; name conflicts with ODOT-run POINT Intercity Bus Service (which is contractor-operated, not the same entity). Bend area intercity is dominated by Pacific Crest Bus Lines and Cascades East Transit.
fit_notes: Likely a misclassified or shell record - the name 'Oregon Inter-City Bus Co' at a residential Bend address with no website, school-bus history, or DOT trace suggests this is NOT an active school-bus contractor. Even if operating, intercity/charter is off-thesis for Summit (yellow-bus K-12). De-prioritize.

name: Farther-Son Transportation
districts_or_customers: Listed in NJ DOE approved school transportation contractor file as 'Father N Son Transportation' (historic)
recent_news: Yelp lists the Matawan location as CLOSED. No active web presence under either 'Father-Son' or 'Farther-Son'. NJ DOE contractor PDF references a 'Father N Son Transportation' but no recent contract activity surfaced.
fit_notes: Likely defunct - Yelp marks the Matawan operation as closed and no recent contract footprint. Not a viable tuck-in target. Recommend removing from active pipeline unless a phone confirmation proves otherwise.

name: Q Q Bus Line Corp
recent_news: FMCSA active for-hire passenger carrier (DOT #2586802, MC-907204), Satisfactory safety rating 11/2025, ~12 power units / 32 drivers, 1.25M miles in 2025. HQ moved from Jamaica Plain (Boston) to Hanover/Quincy MA. BBB profile under Quincy MA bus lines.
fit_notes: Active small MA charter/passenger carrier founded 2015 by Qi Chen - likely serves the Boston-area Chinese community (charter/commuter), NOT a yellow-school-bus K-12 contractor. Off-thesis for Summit absent confirmation of district school contracts. Young company so succession is low.
